message.title: Welcome to WG Desktop 2.15
message.subtitle: You’re using the latest version of WG Desktop. Take a look at the newest features and updates:

content.content: We will now recommend a few of the highest-performing server locations when you’re on the Select location screen.
We’ve updated the App exclusions screen to make it easier to choose which apps to leave out of VPN protection.
We’ve also made bug fixes, UI adjustments and other performance improvements to make WG Desktop even better.

blocks.content: Thank you for installing the latest version of WG Desktop!
